title: Smart Sensitive Detection & Per-Agent Modes
summary: Set how each agent scans for sensitive data — Off, Deterministic (fast rules), or Smart, which adds a cheap LLM pass that catches obfuscated PII the rules miss (e.g. a phone number spelled out in words), surfaced as "caught by LLM". Add per-agent guidance for what counts as sensitive, and optionally redact secrets from replies with a configurable level.

title: Exfiltration Flows & Severity
summary: Every sensitive finding now carries a severity (critical to low), and the trace traces a value from where it enters to where it leaves — flagging when a secret or PII heads toward an outbound tool. Matched values in traces are masked by default and revealable by admins only.

title: LLM Activity Tracing
summary: A Langfuse-style trace for every Slack thread — reasoning, tool calls, and the final answer in time order, with per-step tokens, cost, latency, and model.

title: Sensitive Data Monitoring
summary: Automatic flagging of PII, secrets, and credential access in agent tool calls and replies, with an audit feed, in-trace highlighting, and click-to-explain.

title: Custom Date Ranges & 6-Month Retention
summary: Filter Activity, Usage, Tools, and Sensitive views by a custom date range. Trace data is automatically pruned to a rolling 6 months and idle session clones after 7 days.
